## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences: what changed and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] docs — documentation
- [ ] ci — pipeline / tooling
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] perf — performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] Targets `develop` (or `main` for hotfix/release)
- [ ] `npm run lint` — zero warnings
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` — passes
- [ ] `npm test` — smoke + regression JS
- [ ] Odin CBOR regression if `packages/engine/**` changed
- [ ] No secrets / HAR / tokens committed
- [ ] Docs updated (API, ARCHITECTURE, ADR if design change)
- [ ] Performance budget preserved
